creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

As per IGNORE message: 
** Port marked as IGNORE: devel/cross-binutils: 
you should define TGTARCH and TGTABI to build port 
** Listing the failed packages (-:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed) 
- devel/cross-binutils (marked as IGNORE) 


You MUST define TGTARCH and TGTABI to compile any dependencies. 
put this in /etc/make.conf,  
if you change TGT* for any reason, you must delete dependencies and recompile/reinstall.
